stemHtml: A Commercial Air Transport IFR flight will be operated to an airport which is classified by the Operator as an isolated aerodrome. Compared to flights to most other aerodromes, what is different about this specific flight?

options.a: The flight time to the destination alternate aerodrome may be up to 6 hours.
options.b: The flight time to the destination alternate aerodrome may be up to 2 hours.
options.c: The destination aerodrome does NOT have two independent runways.
options.d: There is NO requirement for a destination alternate aerodrome.
